name: Shandong Dawn Polymer Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shandong Dawn Polymer Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells modified plastics and thermoplastic elastomers. The company offers automobile material, flame retardant plastic, flame retardant reinforced plastic, glass fiber reinforced plastic, plastic alloy, high-melt woven plastic, filler masterbatch, color masterbatch, and special engineering plastic products. Its products are used in automobile, military, electronic, and aviation industry fields. The company also supplies FAW, DFM, CMCC, ISZU, Hair, Hisense, Joyoung, and home appliances manufacturer products. It has operations in China, Europe, East South of Asia, and South Africa. The company is based in Longkou, China.
